title: Privacy Policy
intro: Readya respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data.

sections.title: 1. What Data We Collect
content: We may collect the following information:
Personal data (such as email when creating an account)
Text and documents you input or upload to the platform
Usage data (how you use the service)

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
content: Your information is used for:
Providing and operating the service
Improving user experience
Ensuring system security and stability
Communication when necessary

sections.title: 3. Data Protection
content: We take appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data.
Uploaded text is used solely for providing the service (text-to-speech conversion).

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
content: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, except when:
Required by law
Necessary for the technical operation of the service

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
content: You have the right to:
Access your personal data
Request correction or deletion of your data
Stop using the service at any time

sections.title: 6. Changes
content: This policy may be updated periodically.
Continued use of the service means you agree to the updated terms.
